instruction.assembly: LDA p1, [p1, #0]; MOVX r25, #15; MOV dn2, #7
LDA r27, [p3, #0]; MOVX r24, #819; MOV dn6, #7
MOVA dj2, #512; MOVX r26, #818; MOV dn1, #7
MOVA dc1, #0; MOVX r28, #39; MOV p4, p5
VLDA.3D wl2, [p4], d2; VLDB.3D wl7, [p1], d1; MOVXM p3, #427072
LDA r29, [p3, #0]; VLDB wh1, [p1, #32]; AND r27, r27, r25; MOV p3, p4

VLDA wl7, [p0, #32]; VLDB.3D wl2, [p1], d1; VMAC cm3, cm0, x7, x2, r24
VLDB wh6, [p1, #32]; VMAC cm8, cm8, x0, x9, r26

VLDA wh10, [p1, #32]; MOV p0, p4; VMAC cm0, cm0, x7, x10, r24
VLDA.3D wl10, [p1], d1; VMAC cm4, cm3, x8, x9, r26

VLDB wl11, [p6, #32]; VSRS.s16.s64 wl11, cm7, s0; MOV p5, p0

VMAC cm8, cm8, x6, x3, r26
VMAC cm8, cm8, x0, x9, r26
VSRS.s16.s64 wl11, cm6, s0; VMAC cm7, cm8, x10, x8, r26
VST.3D wl11, [p2], d0; MOV p7, r25
MOVA r31, #-1; PADDB [sp], #32; MOVX r0, #0; MOV p1, p7
